raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1646 seeks to provide out-of-state medical residents invaluable training in comprehensive reproductive and pregnancy care, including abortion.",
    "Medical residents in states that have enacted abortion bans are unable to be fully trained due to those bans.",
    "Almost half of OB-GYN residency programs are in states with abortion bans, affecting about 2,600 of the country’s 6,000 OB-GYN residents.",
    "The U.S. Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe v. Wade has left the right to abortion up to individual states.",
    "Eighteen states have enacted total bans or severe restrictions on abortion as of today.",
    "Abortion bans impact not only patient access to care but also the training availability for medical professionals in obstetrics and gynecology.",
    "Improving California’s ability to host medical residents from abortion-banned states will ensure doctors continue to be fully trained in their licensure."
  ]
}
```
